m_GameDesignComment.description: Internal design comment for developers describing the perk's intended use or design rationale. Not shown to players.

m_LocaState.description: Localization state enum tracking whether this perk's text has been translated, needs review, or is final.

m_ID.description: Unique string identifier for this perk template used in code and data references.

m_IsGarbage.description: Marks perk as deprecated or deleted. Garbage templates are excluded from normal game systems.

m_IsInitialized.description: Internal flag indicating whether OnInit() has been called on this template.

Title.description: Localized display name of the perk shown in UI. Initialized via constructor at 0x78.

Description.description: Full localized description of perk effects displayed in tooltips. Multi-line text support.

ShortDescription.description: Brief localized summary of the perk for compact UI displays.

Icon.description: Base skill icon sprite. For perks, PerkIcon at 0x2D8 is typically used instead in promotion UI.

IconDisabled.description: Greyed out or disabled version of the icon shown when perk cannot be selected or used.

Type.description: Categorizes the skill type (e.g., passive, active, weapon skill). Affects how the perk behaves in combat.

Tags.description: Collection of tags applied to this perk. Used for filtering, prerequisites, and effect targeting.

Order.description: Determines execution priority relative to other skills. Constructor sets default value 50000.

ActionPointCost.description: Action points required to activate this perk if it has an active component. 0 for passive perks.

IsLimitedUses.description: If true, the perk can only be used a limited number of times per mission as defined by Uses field.

Uses.description: Maximum number of uses per mission if IsLimitedUses is true. Constructor default is 1.

UsesDisplayTemplate.description: Template defining how remaining uses are displayed in the UI (e.g., charges, cooldown bar).

IsActive.description: If true, perk must be manually activated. If false, perk is passive and always in effect.

HideApCosts.description: When true, action point costs are hidden in the UI tooltip for this perk.

KeyBind.description: Keyboard shortcut binding for quick activation. Constructor default is 0xFF (none).

ExecutingElement.description: Specifies which unit component executes this skill (weapon, body part, etc.).

AnimationType.description: Animation played when perk is activated or triggers.

AimingType.description: How targeting works for this skill. Constructor default is 1 (self-targeted typical for perks).

IsOverrideAimSlot.description: If true, uses OverrideAimSlot instead of default aiming slot.

OverrideAimSlot.description: Custom aiming visual slot used when IsOverrideAimSlot is true.

IsTargeted.description: Whether the perk requires selecting a target before activation.

TargetingCursor.description: Mouse cursor type shown during targeting. Constructor default is 6.

TargetsAllowed.description: Flags defining valid target types (self, ally, enemy, tile, etc.). Default is 1.

KeepSelectedIfStillUsable.description: If true, skill remains selected in UI after use if it can still be used again.

IsLineOfFireNeeded.description: Whether line of sight to target is required. Constructor default is true.

IsAttack.description: Marks this as an attack skill. Affects AI behavior and damage calculations. Tooltip shows 'ATTACK' label.

IsAlwaysHitting.description: If true, attacks with this skill bypass accuracy checks and always hit.

CanHitAnotherTile.description: Whether projectiles can hit targets on adjacent tiles. Constructor default is true.

IsUsedInBackground.description: If true, skill activates automatically without player input during combat.

OverrideBackgroundUseWithSkill.description: Alternative skill to use when this perk triggers in background mode.

IsIgnoringCover.description: If true, attacks ignore cover bonuses on the target.

IgnoreCoverInside.description: Specifies which container types have their cover ignored by this skill.

IgnoreCoverInsideSpecific.description: Array of specific container types where cover is ignored when attacking inside.

IsSilent.description: If true, using this skill does not alert nearby enemies or break concealment.

IgnoreMalfunctionChance.description: If true, this skill bypasses weapon malfunction checks.

IsDeploymentRequired.description: If true, requires deployment action before use. Tooltip shows 'REQUIRES DEPLOYMENT'.

IsWeaponSetupRequired.description: If true, requires weapon to be set up before use. Tooltip shows 'REQUIRES SETUP'.

IsUsableWhileContained.description: Whether skill can be used while unit is inside a vehicle or container.

IsUsableWhilePinnedDown.description: Whether skill can be used when unit is in pinned down status.

ApplyToEntityInsideStructure.description: If true, effects apply to entities inside structures/containers. Constructor default is true.

IsStacking.description: Whether multiple instances of this perk's effects can stack on a target.

IsRemovedAfterCombat.description: If true, perk effects are cleared when tactical combat ends.

IsRemovedAfterOperation.description: If true, perk effects are removed when the current operation/mission ends.

IsHidden.description: If true, perk is not shown in the unit's skill list UI.

Shape.description: Shape of the targeting/effect area (line, circle, cone, etc.).

ConeAngle.description: Angle in degrees for cone-shaped targeting. Constructor default is 45 (0x2D).

IsOverridingRanges.description: If true, uses skill-defined range values instead of weapon ranges.

MinRange.description: Minimum targeting distance in tiles. Targets closer than this cannot be selected.

IdealRange.description: Optimal targeting distance for AI decision making.

MaxRange.description: Maximum targeting distance in tiles. Targets further cannot be selected.

MinElementDelay.description: Minimum delay between effect elements in seconds.

MaxElementDelay.description: Maximum delay between effect elements. Constructor default is ~0.15f.

ElementDelayBetween.description: Fixed delay between consecutive effect elements in seconds.

MinDelayBeforeSkillUse.description: Minimum time to wait before skill execution begins after activation.

DelayAfterAnimationTrigger.description: Delay in seconds after animation trigger before effects apply.

DelayAfterLastRepetition.description: Wait time after final repetition before skill completion.

DelayAfterSkillUse.description: Cooldown delay after skill use before unit can act again.

IgnoreCameraFocusDelay.description: If true, skips camera focus delay when skill is executed.

Repetitions.description: Number of times to repeat the skill effect. Constructor default is 1.

RepetitionDelay.description: Delay between repetitions in seconds. Constructor default is 0.5f.

SkipDelayForLastRepetition.description: If true, final repetition skips the normal delay.

IsPlayingAnimationForEachRepetition.description: If true, animation plays for each repetition. Constructor default is true.

UseCustomAoEShape.description: If true, uses CustomAoEShape instead of standard AoE calculation.

CustomAoEShape.description: Custom area of effect shape definition for non-standard targeting patterns.

AoEType.description: Type of area of effect (radius, cone, line, etc.).

AoEFilter.description: Condition filter determining which entities in AoE are affected.

TargetFaction.description: Faction type filter for valid targets. Constructor default is 3 (all factions).

AoEChanceToHitCenter.description: Percentage chance to hit center tile of AoE. Constructor default is 50.

SelectableTiles.description: Number of tiles that can be selected for multi-target skills.

ScatterMode.description: How scatter/spread is calculated for projectile deviation.

Scatter.description: Base scatter value in tiles. Higher values cause more deviation.

ScatterChance.description: Percentage chance for scatter to occur. Constructor default is 50.

ScatterHitEachTileOnlyOnce.description: If true, scattered projectiles only hit each tile once.

ScatterHitOnlyValidTiles.description: If true, scatter only hits valid targetable tiles.

MuzzleType.description: Type of muzzle flash effect for the skill.

MuzzleSelection.description: Array of muzzle types for random selection on each use.

MuzzleEffect.description: Visual effect prefab spawned at weapon muzzle on skill use.

MuzzleEffectOverrides2.description: Override muzzle effects based on surface type being shot.

IsSpawningMuzzleForEachRepetition.description: If true, spawns muzzle effect for each repetition of the skill. Constructor default is 0x101.

IsAttachingMuzzleToTransform.description: If true, muzzle effect follows weapon transform during animation.

CameraEffectOnFire.description: Camera shake or effect triggered when skill fires.

ProjectileSpawnPositionOffset.description: Offset from muzzle position where projectiles spawn.

ProjectileData.description: Primary projectile configuration including speed, arc, and visuals.

SecondaryProjectileData.description: Secondary projectile for skills that fire multiple projectile types.

DefaultImpactEffect.description: Visual effect prefab spawned on projectile impact.

DefaultImpactDecals.description: Collection of decals applied to surfaces on impact.

DefaultSoundOnRicochet.description: Sound effect ID played when projectile ricochets off surface.

DefaultSoundOnImpact.description: Sound effect ID played on projectile impact.

ImpactOnSurface.description: Per-surface-type impact effect definitions (metal, concrete, flesh, etc.).

ImpactEffectDelay.description: Delay in seconds before impact visual effect spawns.

ImpactDecalDelay.description: Delay in seconds before impact decal is applied.

EffectDelayAfterImpact.description: Delay after impact before applying damage/status effects.

IsImpactShownOnHit.description: If true, impact effects only show when target is actually hit.

IsImpactCenteredOnTile.description: If true, centers impact effect on tile rather than exact hit point.

IsImpactOnlyOnAOECenterTile.description: If true, impact effect only spawns on AoE center tile.

IsDecalOnlyOnAOECenterTile.description: If true, decal only applies to AoE center tile.

IsImpactCenteredOnExecutingElement.description: If true, centers impact on the executing unit/weapon.

IsImpactAlignedToInfantry.description: If true, aligns impact rotation to target infantry facing. Constructor default is true.

CameraEffectOnImpact.description: Camera shake or effect on projectile impact.

CameraEffectOnPlayerHit.description: Special camera effect when player units are hit. Constructor default is 1.

IsTriggeringHeavyDamagedReceivedEffect.description: If true, triggers heavy damage received visual effect on target.

RagdollImpactMult.description: Multiplier range for horizontal ragdoll force on death. Constructor default is (0.7, 1.0).

VerticalRagdollImpactMult.description: Multiplier range for vertical ragdoll force on death.

RagdollHitArea.description: Which body part the ragdoll force is applied to.

MalfunctionChance.description: Percentage chance the skill causes weapon malfunction.

MalfunctionEffect.description: Visual effect prefab spawned when malfunction occurs.

SoundOnMalfunction.description: Sound effect ID played on weapon malfunction.

IsAudibleWhenNotVisible.description: If true, skill sounds play even when executing unit is not visible. Constructor default is true.

SoundsOnBeforeUse.description: Sound effects played before skill execution begins.

SoundsOnUse.description: Sound effects played when skill is used.

SoundsOnAttackPerElement.description: Sound effects played for each element of a multi-element attack.

IsSoundOnAttackPerElementPlayingAfterAni.description: If true, per-element attack sounds play after animation delay.

SoundsOnAttack.description: Sound effects played on attack action.

SoundsOnHit.description: Sound effects played when attack hits target.

SoundsOnElementDestroyed.description: Sound effects played when target element/body part is destroyed.

SoundsOnBeforeUseFar.description: Distant version of before-use sounds for far camera positions.

SoundsOnUseFar.description: Distant version of use sounds for far camera positions.

SoundsOnAttackPerElementFar.description: Distant version of per-element attack sounds.

IsSoundOnAttackPerElementFarPlayingAfter.description: If true, far per-element attack sounds play after animation delay.

SoundsOnAttackFar.description: Distant version of attack sounds for far camera positions.

EventHandlers.description: Event handlers triggered during skill execution (on hit, on kill, etc.).

AIConfig.description: AI behavior configuration for when and how AI uses this skill.

m_LocalizedStrings.description: Array of all localizable strings in this template for localization system.

PerkIcon.description: Perk-specific icon shown in promotion tree and unit skill lists. Used by AppendTooltipData at offset 0x5b.

m_GameDesignComment.description: Designer notes field for internal documentation purposes. Not used at runtime.

m_LocaState.description: Localization workflow state indicator. Tracks translation status.

m_ID.description: Unique string identifier for this skill template. Used in mod references and lookups.

m_IsGarbage.description: Marks template for garbage collection or indicates deprecated/unused state.

m_IsInitialized.description: Runtime flag indicating whether OnInit has been called on this template.

Title.description: Localized display name shown in UI. Initialized in constructor at 0x78.

Description.description: Full localized description text for tooltips. Multi-line format.

ShortDescription.description: Brief localized description for compact UI displays. Multi-line format.

Icon.description: Skill icon displayed when ability is available/selected. Used in tooltips at size 138x138.

IconDisabled.description: Greyed out or disabled version of skill icon shown when unusable.

Type.description: Skill category flags (e.g. Passive=0x100). Used by GetUsageInfoSkill to determine behavior.

Tags.description: List of tags for categorization and filtering. Iterated by ForEachTag method.

Order.description: Skill execution priority/ordering. Default value 50000 set in constructor.

ActionPointCost.description: AP cost to use this skill. Displayed in tooltip when IsActive is true.

IsLimitedUses.description: If true, skill has limited number of uses per mission defined by Uses field.

Uses.description: Number of times skill can be used when IsLimitedUses is true. Default 1.

UsesDisplayTemplate.description: Template defining how remaining uses are displayed in the UI.

IsActive.description: Whether skill is an active ability (costs AP) vs passive. Checked at 0xC8 in tooltip.

HideApCosts.description: If true, hides AP cost display in tooltip even when skill is active.

KeyBind.description: Keyboard shortcut binding for this skill. Default value 0xFF (unbound).

ExecutingElement.description: Which body part or weapon executes this skill (e.g. arm, mounted weapon).

AnimationType.description: Animation to play when skill is used.

AimingType.description: How aiming works for this skill. Default value 1 set in constructor.

IsOverrideAimSlot.description: If true, uses OverrideAimSlot instead of default aiming point.

OverrideAimSlot.description: Specific body/equipment slot to use for aiming when IsOverrideAimSlot is true.

IsTargeted.description: Whether skill requires selecting a target before use.

TargetingCursor.description: Mouse cursor type shown when targeting this skill. Default value 6.

TargetsAllowed.description: Flags defining valid target types (enemies, allies, self, terrain, etc.). Default 1.

KeepSelectedIfStillUsable.description: If true, skill remains selected after use if it can still be used again.

IsLineOfFireNeeded.description: Whether clear line of sight is required. Default true. Affects tooltip display.

IsAttack.description: Marks skill as an attack. Affects AI behavior and tooltip warnings about deployment.

IsAlwaysHitting.description: If true, attack always hits target (100% accuracy).

CanHitAnotherTile.description: Whether projectile can affect tiles other than the targeted one. Default true.

IsUsedInBackground.description: Whether skill executes in background without full animation sequence.

OverrideBackgroundUseWithSkill.description: Alternative skill to use when executing in background mode.

IsIgnoringCover.description: If true, attack ignores all cover bonuses.

IgnoreCoverInside.description: Type of cover to ignore. Value 1 ignores all cover inside containers.

IgnoreCoverInsideSpecific.description: Array of specific container types where cover is ignored. Checked in IsIgnoringCoverInsideForTarget.

IsSilent.description: If true, skill use does not alert enemies or make noise.

IgnoreMalfunctionChance.description: If true, weapon malfunction chance is not applied when using this skill.

IsDeploymentRequired.description: Whether weapon must be deployed before using skill. Checked in IsDeploymentRequirementSatisfied.

IsWeaponSetupRequired.description: Whether weapon requires setup/configuration before using skill. Shows tooltip warning.

IsUsableWhileContained.description: Whether skill can be used while inside a vehicle or container.

IsUsableWhilePinnedDown.description: Whether skill can be used while actor is pinned down by suppression.

ApplyToEntityInsideStructure.description: Whether effects apply to entities inside structures/buildings. Default true.

IsStacking.description: Whether multiple applications of this skill stack their effects.

IsRemovedAfterCombat.description: If true, skill effects are removed when combat ends.

IsRemovedAfterOperation.description: If true, skill effects are removed when the tactical operation ends.

IsHidden.description: If true, skill is not shown in UI skill lists.

Shape.description: Shape of skill's effective area (circle, cone, line, etc.).

ConeAngle.description: Cone angle in degrees when Shape is cone type. Default 45 degrees.

IsOverridingRanges.description: If true, uses skill's own range values instead of weapon's ranges.

MinRange.description: Minimum range in tiles for skill use. Targets closer cannot be selected.

IdealRange.description: Optimal range for skill. May affect accuracy or AI targeting decisions.

MaxRange.description: Maximum range in tiles. Targets beyond this distance cannot be selected.

MinElementDelay.description: Minimum time delay in seconds before executing skill elements.

MaxElementDelay.description: Maximum time delay in seconds before executing skill elements. Default 0.15f.

ElementDelayBetween.description: Time delay between consecutive skill element executions.

MinDelayBeforeSkillUse.description: Minimum pause time before skill execution begins.

DelayAfterAnimationTrigger.description: Time to wait after animation trigger before applying effects.

DelayAfterLastRepetition.description: Time to wait after final repetition before skill completes.

DelayAfterSkillUse.description: Cooldown delay after skill use before actor can act again.

IgnoreCameraFocusDelay.description: If true, camera does not pause to focus on skill execution.

Repetitions.description: Number of times skill effect repeats. Default 1. Used for burst fire etc.

SkipDelayForLastRepetition.description: If true, final repetition has no delay applied.

IsPlayingAnimationForEachRepetition.description: If true, animation plays for each repetition. Default true.

AoeShape.description: 2D bool array (9x9) defining custom AOE shape. Center at [4,4]. Used by GetAoeRadius and GetRotatedTile.

UseCustomAoEShape.description: If true, uses CustomAoEShape object instead of AoeShape array for AOE calculation.

CustomAoEShape.description: Custom AOE shape implementation. GetAoeRadius calls interface method when UseCustomAoEShape is true.

AoEType.description: AOE behavior type. Non-zero value indicates skill has AOE component. Checked by GetAoeRadius.

AoEFilter.description: Condition filter for determining which entities in AOE are affected.

TargetFaction.description: Faction targeting filter for skill effects.

AoEChanceToHitCenter.description: Base accuracy percentage for hitting center of AOE. Default 50%.

SelectableTiles.description: Number of tiles player can select for targeting. Default 3.

ScatterMode.description: How projectile scatter is calculated (random, weighted, etc.).

Scatter.description: Maximum scatter distance in tiles. Used by Skill.Scatter for miss calculations. Default 50.

ScatterChance.description: Percentage chance for scatter to occur on each shot. Default 50%.

ScatterHitEachTileOnlyOnce.description: If true, each tile can only be hit once during scatter calculation.

ScatterHitOnlyValidTiles.description: If true, scatter only considers tiles that pass target verification. Calls GetAvailableScatterTiles.

MuzzleType.description: Muzzle type for visual effects. Value -2 uses MuzzleSelection array instead.

MuzzleSelection.description: Array of muzzle types cycled through for each shot when MuzzleType is -2.

MuzzleEffect.description: Visual effect prefab spawned at muzzle when skill fires.

IsSpawningMuzzleForEachRepetition.description: If true, muzzle effect spawns for each repetition. Default 0x101 (flags).

IsAttachingMuzzleToTransform.description: If true, muzzle effect is parented to weapon transform.

ProjectileSpawnPositionOffset.description: Offset from muzzle position where projectile spawns.

ProjectileData.description: Primary projectile configuration including speed, arc, and visuals.

SecondaryProjectileData.description: Secondary projectile for skills that fire multiple projectile types.

DefaultImpactEffect.description: Default visual effect at impact point. Returned by GetImpactEffect as fallback.

DefaultImpactDecals.description: Default decal collection applied at impact locations.

DefaultSoundOnRicochet.description: Sound ID played when projectile ricochets off surfaces.

DefaultSoundOnImpact.description: Sound ID played when projectile impacts target.

ImpactOnSurface.description: Surface-specific impact effects (14 entries). Initialized in OnInit if null.

ImpactEffectDelay.description: Time delay before impact effect plays after hit.

ImpactDecalDelay.description: Time delay before impact decal appears after hit.

EffectDelayAfterImpact.description: Time delay after impact before skill effects are applied.

IsImpactShownOnHit.description: Whether impact visual is displayed when target is hit.

IsImpactCenteredOnTile.description: If true, impact effect spawns at tile center rather than hit point.

IsImpactOnlyOnAOECenterTile.description: If true, impact effect only appears on center tile of AOE, not all affected tiles.

IsDecalOnlyOnAOECenterTile.description: If true, decals only appear on center tile of AOE.

IsImpactCenteredOnExecutingElement.description: If true, impact effect centered on executing body part/weapon.

IsImpactAlignedToInfantry.description: If true, impact effect rotation aligned to infantry orientation. Default true.

CameraEffectOnPlayerHit.description: Camera effect when player unit is hit by this skill. Default 1.

IsTriggeringHeavyDamagedReceivedEffect.description: If true, triggers heavy damage received visual effect on target.

RagdollImpactMult.description: Horizontal ragdoll force multiplier range (min, max). Default (0.7, 1.0).

VerticalRagdollImpactMult.description: Vertical ragdoll force multiplier range (min, max). Affects corpse trajectory.

RagdollHitArea.description: Which body area ragdoll force is applied to on death.

MalfunctionChance.description: Percentage chance of weapon malfunction when using this skill.

MalfunctionEffect.description: Visual effect prefab played when weapon malfunctions.

SoundOnMalfunction.description: Sound ID played when weapon malfunctions.

IsAudibleWhenNotVisible.description: If true, skill sounds play even when unit is not visible to player. Default true.

SoundsOnBeforeUse.description: Sound IDs played before skill use begins. Iterated by PlaySounds.

SoundsOnUse.description: Sound IDs played when skill is used/activated.

SoundsOnAttackPerElement.description: Sound IDs played for each attacking element (multiple projectiles, etc.).

IsSoundOnAttackPerElementPlayingAfterAni.description: If true, per-element attack sounds wait for animation delay.

SoundsOnAttack.description: Sound IDs played when attack fires.

SoundsOnHit.description: Sound IDs played when attack hits target.

SoundsOnElementDestroyed.description: Sound IDs played when skill destroys a body part or element.

SoundsOnBeforeUseFar.description: Distant/far version of SoundsOnBeforeUse for audio falloff.

SoundsOnUseFar.description: Distant/far version of SoundsOnUse for audio falloff.

SoundsOnAttackPerElementFar.description: Distant/far version of SoundsOnAttackPerElement for audio falloff.

IsSoundOnAttackPerElementFarPlayingAfter.description: If true, far per-element attack sounds wait for animation delay.

SoundsOnAttackFar.description: Distant/far version of SoundsOnAttack for audio falloff.

EventHandlers.description: List of event handlers defining skill effects. Used by CreateSkill to instantiate Skill.

AIConfig.description: AI behavior configuration. GetGoal checks for InflictDamage, InflictSuppression, Stun types.

m_LocalizedStrings.description: Array of all localizable strings in this template for localization system.

m_GameDesignComment.description: Internal design comment for developers. Not used at runtime, purely for documentation purposes in the editor.

m_LocaState.description: Localization workflow state tracking whether text is translated, needs review, or is finalized.

m_ID.description: Unique string identifier for this entity template. Used for save/load and asset references.

m_IsGarbage.description: Marks template as deprecated/unused. Garbage templates may be excluded from builds or asset loading.

m_IsInitialized.description: Runtime flag indicating OnInit has been called. Prevents double initialization of template data.

Title.description: Localized display name shown in UI tooltips and unit info panels. Used in GetSimpleTooltipData at 0x78.

Description.description: Multi-line localized description text. Displayed in tooltips via GetSimpleTooltipData reading from 0x80.

Type.description: Primary entity classification (Actor=2, Structure=1, etc). IsInfantry/IsVehicle/IsTurret check Type==2 at 0x88.

ActorType.description: Sub-type for actors: 0=Infantry, 1=Vehicle, 2=Turret. Checked at 0x8c in IsInfantry/IsVehicle/IsTurret methods.

StructureType.description: Classification for structure entities (walls, props, destructibles). Affects pathfinding and destruction.

SurfaceType.description: Surface material type affecting footstep sounds, movement effects, and visual decals. Default value 1 set in ctor.

SpeakerTemplate.description: Reference to speaker configuration for dialogue/barks. Defines voice, portrait, and conversation behavior.

Tags.description: List of tag templates for categorization. ForEachTag iterates 0x98 (old offset); HasTag checks ContainsTag on list.

ElementsMin.description: Minimum number of body elements (limbs/sections) this entity can have. Default 1 set in constructor at 0xa0.

ElementsMax.description: Maximum number of body elements. Together with ElementsMin defines element count variance. Default 1 at 0xa4.

ChanceForFemaleElements.description: Percentage chance (0-100) for female character model elements when spawning humanoid entities.

ArmyPointCost.description: Point cost for army building and mission difficulty calculations. Higher values = stronger/more expensive units.

ReqCampaignProgress.description: Campaign progress range (min,max) required for this entity to appear. Controls when enemies unlock in campaign.

ProvidesCover.description: Type of cover this entity provides when used as cover (None, Half, Full). Affects shooting accuracy bonuses.

ProvidesCoverWhenDestroyed.description: Whether entity still provides cover after being destroyed. Rubble may provide half cover.

UsesCover.description: How this entity uses cover when in combat. Affects AI positioning and accuracy calculations.

IsContainableInEntities.description: Whether this entity can be contained inside other entities (vehicles, buildings). Enables enter/exit mechanics.

ContainerType.description: Type of container this entity represents. Checked at 0xC8 in TryGetConversationActorType for nested entities.

ContainedEntityOnSpawn.description: Entity template to spawn inside this container on creation. Used for pre-populated vehicles/structures.

DespawnIfEmpty.description: Whether container entity despawns when all contained entities exit or die. For temporary transport vehicles.

ProvidesCoverInside.description: Cover template applied to units inside this container. Defines protection level for embarked soldiers.

EffectOnContained.description: Status effect applied to entities while contained inside this entity. Used for buffs/debuffs in vehicles.

IsIgnoredInActorCount.description: Whether entity is excluded from actor count for mission victory conditions. Used for props, scenery.

IsDestructible.description: Whether entity can be damaged and destroyed. Indestructible entities ignore all damage. Default true at 0xf1.

IsSurfaceChangedOnDeath.description: Whether the tile surface type changes when this entity dies. Used for blood pools, scorch marks.

ChangeSurfaceOnDeath.description: Surface type to change tile to when entity dies. Only used if IsSurfaceChangedOnDeath is true.

IsTraversableByInfantry.description: Whether infantry units can move through this entity's tile. False for solid obstacles, true for low cover.

IsAffectedByFatalities.description: Whether entity can trigger or be subject to fatality/execution animations when killed.

DestroyPropsOnDeath.description: Whether nearby props are destroyed when this entity dies. Used for large explosions, vehicle wrecks.

DestroyPropsRadius.description: Radius in tiles for destroying props on death. Only used if DestroyPropsOnDeath is true.

DefectGroups.description: List of defect/mutation groups that can be applied to this entity. For randomized enemy variations.

AnimationSoundTemplate.description: Template defining animation-triggered sounds (footsteps, attacks, etc). Struct containing sound mappings.

IsAligningWithTerrain.description: Whether entity model aligns rotation with terrain slope. True for vehicles, false for infantry. Default true at 0x118.

FixedRotationForDestroyedPrefab.description: Whether destroyed prefab uses fixed rotation or inherits live entity rotation. For consistent wreckage.

IsCompatibleWithCables.description: Whether entity can connect to/interact with cable systems. For power networks, zip lines.

HasExtendedRangeForCables.description: Whether entity has extended cable connection range. For larger structures, power stations.

CameraAutoHeightOffset.description: Vertical offset for camera auto-height when focusing on this entity. Larger entities need higher offset.

OverrideMissionPreviewColor.description: Whether to use custom color for this entity in mission preview/deployment screen.

MissionPreviewColorOverride.description: RGBA color used in mission preview when OverrideMissionPreviewColor is true. 16-byte struct.

Prefabs.description: List of prefab variations for this entity. GetRandomPrefab selects from list at 0x138 using PseudoRandom.

Decoration.description: Large decoration prefab lists attached to entity. Visual embellishments, equipment overlays.

SmallDecoration.description: Small decoration prefab lists. Details like pouches, patches, small accessories on character models.

DestroyedPrefabs.description: Prefab variations shown when entity is destroyed. Wreckage, corpse, debris models.

DestroyedDecoration.description: Decoration prefabs for destroyed state. Damage details, exposed internals, debris attachments.

DestroyedWalls.description: Wall prefabs for destroyed structure state. Broken walls, collapsed sections for buildings.

Scale.description: Scale range (min,max) for entity prefab. Random scale between values. Default (1,1) at 0x168/0x16c.

OverrideScaleForSquadLeader.description: Whether squad leaders use different scale than regular units. For visually distinct commanders.

ScaleOffsetSquadLeader.description: Additional scale multiplier for squad leaders. Default ~0.1 (10% larger) at 0x174.

ActorLightOverride.description: Custom light prefab attached to actor. Overrides default actor lighting for special units.

ActorLightParentName.description: Transform name to parent the actor light to. Typically 'root' or 'spine'. Initialized with default at 0x180.

m_SerBlockedTiles.description: Serialized blocked tiles bitmap. Used in OnBeforeSerialize/OnAfterDeserialize at 0x190 for 7x7 grid.

IsBlockingLineOfSight.description: Whether entity blocks line of sight for targeting and vision. Solid walls=true, low cover=false.

m_SerBlockedLineOfSight.description: Serialized LOS blocking bitmap. Processed in OnAfterDeserialize at 0x1a8 alongside blocked tiles.

CustomLineOfSightOffset.description: Offset for line of sight origin point. Adjusts where LOS rays originate from for tall entities.

HudYOffsetScale.description: Vertical offset scale for HUD elements (health bars, status icons). Default 1.0 at 0x1b8.

Badge.description: Entity badge/icon sprite shown in UI. Standard colored version for faction display.

BadgeWhite.description: White/monochrome badge variant for UI overlays and silhouette displays.

PreviewMapIcon.description: Icon sprite for mission preview map and strategic displays. Simplified entity representation.

AttachedPrefabs.description: Array of prefabs attached to specific bones/transforms. Initialized as empty array in constructor at 0x1d8.

FactionSpecificAnimation.description: Animation style variant based on faction. Different movement/combat animations per faction.

AimWithVisualSlot.description: Which visual slot's equipment determines aiming animations. For weapons affecting aim pose.

AnimatorTemplate.description: Animation template defining animator parameters, states, and transitions for this entity.

OverrideAnimatorController.description: Optional animator controller override. Replaces default faction animator with custom one.

MinSkinQuality.description: Minimum skin quality level for skeletal mesh. Default 1 at 0x1f8. Affects bone count, deformation.

BloodDecals.description: Default blood decal collection. GetBloodDecals returns this at 0x200 if no override matches surface.

BloodDecalsOverride.description: Surface-specific blood decal overrides. GetBloodDecals checks 0x208 first for surface-matched decals.

BloodPool.description: Default blood pool decal collection. GetBloodpool returns this at 0x210 if no override matches.

BloodPoolOverride.description: Surface-specific blood pool overrides. GetBloodpool checks 0x218 for surface-matched pools.

BloodPoolTriggerType.description: When blood pool effect triggers (OnDeath, OnDamage, etc). Default 3 at 0x220.

BloodPoolAnimation.description: Whether blood pool uses animated spreading effect. Default true at 0x224.

DamageReceivedEffect.description: Particle effect spawned when entity takes normal damage. Blood splatter, sparks, etc.

HeavyDamageReceivedEffect.description: Particle effect for heavy damage hits. More intense visual feedback than normal damage.

DamageReceivedEffectThreshold.description: Damage threshold percentage for heavy damage effect. Default ~0.1 (10%) at 0x238.

GetDismemberedBloodSprayEffect.description: Blood spray effect when body parts are dismembered. Arterial spray particle system.

GetDismemberedSmallAdditionalParts.description: Small debris parts spawned on dismemberment. Flesh chunks, bone fragments.

DeathEffectOverrides2.description: Surface-specific death effect overrides. GetDeathEffect checks 0x250 first for surface-matched effects.

DeathEffect.description: Default death effect prefab. GetDeathEffect returns 0x258 (decimal 600) if no override matches.

DeathEffectTriggerType.description: When death effect triggers (Immediate, OnAnimationEvent, etc). Default 1 at 0x260.

DeathAttachEffect.description: Effect attached to corpse after death. Lingering fire, smoke, energy dissipation.

IsSinkingIntoGroundOnDeath.description: Whether corpse sinks into ground after death. Default true at 0x270. For cleanup/despawn.

DeathCameraEffect.description: Camera effect triggered on death (shake, zoom, slow-mo). For dramatic kill shots.

SoundOnAim.description: Sound event ID played when aiming at this entity. Warning sounds, target acquisition cues.

SoundWhileAlive.description: Ambient sound loop while entity is alive. Engine idle, breathing, electrical hum.

ExhaustDriveEffect.description: Vehicle exhaust effect when driving. Smoke/particle emission during movement.

ExhaustRevEffect.description: Vehicle exhaust effect when revving/accelerating. Intense burst for speed changes.

ExhaustIdleEffect.description: Vehicle exhaust effect when idle. Gentle smoke puffs while stationary.

MovementEffectOverrides2.description: Surface-specific movement effect overrides. Dust on dirt, sparks on metal, splashes in water.

TriggerMovementEffectsOnStep.description: Whether movement effects trigger on footsteps vs continuous. For distinct step-based effects.

TriggerMovementStepIntervall.description: Interval in frames between movement effect triggers. Default 1 at 0x2ac. Lower = more frequent.

MovementType.description: Reference to movement type defining speed, terrain costs, and traversable surfaces.

VisualPositioning.description: How entity is visually positioned on tiles (Center, Edge, Corner). Default 1 at 0x2b8.

PullTowardsTileCenter.description: Strength of visual pull towards tile center. 0=edge, 1=center. Affects idle positioning.

RotationAfterMovement.description: How entity rotates after completing movement (FaceTarget, FaceMovement, None). Default 1 at 0x2c0.

CameraShakeOnMovement.description: Whether movement causes camera shake. For heavy units like vehicles, mechs.

CameraShakeOnMovementStepInterval.description: Steps between camera shakes during movement. Default 1 at 0x2c8. Lower = more shaking.

CameraShakeOnMovementDuration.description: Duration of each movement camera shake in seconds. Default ~0.2 at 0x2cc.

CameraShakeOnMovementIntensity.description: Intensity of movement camera shake. Default ~0.2 at 0x2d0. Higher = more violent shake.

CameraShakeOnMovementRecoverTime.description: Time for camera to recover from movement shake. Default ~0.2 at 0x2d4. Smooth return to normal.

InventoryType.description: Reference defining inventory layout and slot configuration. ForEachValidItem checks 0x2d8 for slot support.

Items.description: Default items equipped on spawn. ForEachValidItem and HasTag iterate 0x2e0 for item processing.

Loot.description: Loot table entries dropped on death. Randomized rewards based on weights and conditions.

ModularVehicle.description: Template for modular vehicle configuration. Defines hardpoints, weapons, modules for customizable vehicles.

Properties.description: Base stats container (HP, armor, AP, accuracy, etc). Created in ctor at 0x2f8. Core combat attributes.

SkillGroups.description: Skill category groups for UI organization. ForEachTag and HasTag iterate 0x300 for nested skill tags.

Skills.description: Available skills/abilities for this entity. ForEachTag and HasTag iterate 0x308 for skill tag checking.

AIRole.description: AI behavior role data. Created in ctor at 0x310. Defines combat priorities, target selection, positioning.

m_LocalizedStrings.description: Cached array of localized strings. GetLocalizedStrings checks/creates at 0x318. Contains Title + Description.

BehaviorScorePOW.description: Exponent applied to behavior scores before final selection. Higher values favor high-scoring behaviors more strongly. Default: 1.0.

TTL_MAX.description: Maximum time-to-live for AI decision caching. Limits how many turns cached decisions remain valid. Default: 4.

UtilityPOW.description: Exponent applied to raw utility scores in calculations. Shapes the utility curve. Default: 0.75.

UtilityScale.description: Linear multiplier applied to utility values after power transformation. Default: 1.0.

UtilityPostPOW.description: Secondary exponent applied after initial utility scaling. Fine-tunes utility distribution. Default: 1.0.

UtilityPostScale.description: Final linear multiplier for utility scores. Default: 1.0.

SafetyPOW.description: Exponent for safety score calculations. Higher values make safety differences more impactful. Default: 1.15.

SafetyScale.description: Linear multiplier for safety scores in tile evaluation. Default: 1.0.

SafetyPostPOW.description: Secondary exponent for safety calculations. Default: 1.0.

SafetyPostScale.description: Final multiplier for processed safety scores. Default: 1.0.

DistanceScale.description: Multiplier for distance-based scoring in TileScore.GetScore(). Affects how distance impacts tile selection. Default: 10.0.

DistancePickScale.description: Scaling factor when selecting among tiles at different distances. Default: 1.0.

ThreatLevelPOW.description: Exponent for threat level calculations. Shapes how threat magnitude affects decisions. Default: 1.0.

OpportunityLevelPOW.description: Exponent for opportunity (offensive potential) scoring. Default: 1.0.

PickingScoreMultPOW.description: Exponent applied when comparing scores between options. Default: 1.0.

DistanceToCurrentTile.description: Weight for preferring positions near current tile. Reduces excessive movement. Default: 1.0.

DistanceToZones.description: Weight multiplier for distance to objective zones. Higher values prioritize zone proximity. Default: 2.0.

DistanceToAdvanceZones.description: Weight for distance to advance/attack zones. Encourages aggressive positioning. Default: 2.0.

SafetyOutsideDefendZones.description: Safety penalty multiplier when outside defensive zones. Lower values penalize leaving zones. Default: 1.0.

SafetyOutsideDefendZonesVehicles.description: Safety penalty for vehicles outside defend zones. May differ from infantry values. Default: 1.0.

OccupyZoneValue.description: Utility bonus for occupying objective zones. Encourages zone control. Default: 4.0.

CaptureZoneValue.description: Utility bonus for capturing contested zones. Prioritizes capture actions. Default: 4.0.

CoverAgainstOpponents.description: Weight for cover quality when evaluating positions against enemies. Default: 1.0.

ThreatFromOpponents.description: Base multiplier for opponent threat evaluation. Used in ThreatFromOpponents.Evaluate(). Default: 1.0.

ThreatFromTileEffects.description: Multiplier for unknown/unrevealed threat evaluation. Comment shows default: 0.1. Reduces threat from fog-of-war.

ThreatFromOpponentsDamage.description: Multiplier for expected damage in threat calculations. Scales damage component of threat. Default: 10.0.

ThreatFromOpponentsArmorDamage.description: Multiplier for armor damage threat component. Used with TargetValueArmorScale. Default: 1.0.

ThreatFromOpponentsSuppression.description: Multiplier for suppression threat in opponent evaluation. Default: 1.0.

ThreatFromOpponentsStun.description: Multiplier for stun threat from opponents. Considers stun damage potential. Default: 1.0.

ThreatFromPinnedDownOpponents.description: Threat reduction for pinned down enemies. Lower values reduce perceived threat. Default: 1.0.

ThreatFromSuppressedOpponents.description: Threat modifier for panicked/suppressed enemies. Comment shows default: 0.75. Reduces threat from debuffed foes.

ThreatFrom2xStunnedOpponents.description: Threat modifier for stunned enemies. Comment shows default: 0.85. Heavily stunned enemies pose less threat.

ThreatFromFleeingOpponents.description: Threat modifier for fleeing/vehicle-damaged enemies. Comment shows default: 0.25.

ThreatFromOpponentsAlreadyActed.description: Threat modifier for enemies who already acted this turn. Comment shows default: 0.75.

ThreatFromOpponentsButAlliesInControl.description: Threat modifier when allies control the engagement (leader bonus). Comment shows default: 0.9.

ThreatFromOpponentsAtHypotheticalPositio.description: Threat multiplier when multiple attackers target same unit. Comment shows default: 0.5.

AllyMetascoreAgainstThreshold.description: Threshold for ally metascore comparisons. Affects coordinated targeting decisions. Default: 0.5.

AvoidAlliesPOW.description: Exponent for ally avoidance in positioning. Comment shows ThreatThreshold default: 6.0. Prevents clustering.

AvoidOpponentsPOW.description: Exponent for opponent avoidance calculations. Affects defensive positioning. Default: 1.25.

FleeFromOpponentsPOW.description: Exponent for flee behavior intensity. Higher values create more urgent fleeing. Default: 3.0.

ScalePositionWithTags.description: Multiplier for tag-based position scaling. Affects AI response to specific unit tags. Default: 3.0.

IncludeAttacksAgainstAllOpponentsMult.description: Multiplier for considering all opponents when evaluating attacks. Default: 2.5.

OppositeSideDistanceFromOpponentCap.description: Maximum distance cap for flanking/opposite-side positioning calculations. Default: 16.

CullTilesDistances.description: Distance threshold for culling tiles from consideration. Reduces computation by ignoring distant tiles. Default: 20.

DistanceToZoneDeployScore.description: Weight for zone distance during deployment phase. Affects initial placement priorities. Default: 4.0.

DistanceToAlliesScore.description: Weight for ally proximity during deployment. Encourages group cohesion. Default: 1.0.

CoverInEachDirectionBonus.description: Bonus per direction of cover during deployment evaluation. Default: 0.1.

InsideBuildingDuringDeployment.description: Bonus for deploying inside buildings. Encourages defensive deployment. Default: 3.0.

DeploymentConcealmentMult.description: Multiplier for concealment value during deployment. Default: 1.0.

InvisibleTargetValueMult.description: Multiplier for targeting invisible/unseen enemies. Comment shows NotVisible default: 0.25.

TargetValueDamageScale.description: Scaling factor for damage in target value calculations. Central to attack decisions. Default: 0.25.

TargetValueArmorScale.description: Scaling factor for armor damage in target evaluation. Affects anti-armor prioritization. Default: 1.0.

TargetValueSuppressionScale.description: Scaling factor for suppression value in targeting. Default: 1.0.

TargetValueStunScale.description: Scaling factor for stun damage in target evaluation. Also affects morale damage. Default: 1.0.

TargetValueThreatScale.description: Scaling factor for threat-based targeting. Higher values prioritize threatening enemies. Default: 1.0.

TargetValueMaxThreatSuppressScale.description: Scaling for suppression when target is maximum threat. Comment shows ThreatScaling default: 0.25.

ScoreThresholdWithLimitedUses.description: Minimum score required to use limited-use abilities. Comment shows MinAttackValue default: 0.1.

FriendlyFirePenalty.description: Penalty multiplier for attacks risking friendly fire. Comment shows default: 1.0. Higher reduces FF willingness.

DamageBaseScore.description: Base score value for damage-dealing behaviors. Foundation for attack utility. Default: 1.0.

DamageScoreMult.description: Multiplier scaling damage score by actual damage dealt. Default: 100.0.

InflictDamageFromTile.description: Utility from tile multiplier for InflictDamage behavior. Accessed at offset 0x10c. Default: 1.0.

SuppressionBaseScore.description: Base score for suppression-causing behaviors. Default: 1.0.

SuppressionScoreMult.description: Multiplier for suppression score based on suppression amount. Default: 100.0.

InflictSuppressionFromTile.description: Tile-based utility multiplier for InflictSuppression. Accessed at 0x118. Default: 1.0.

StunBaseScore.description: Base score for stun-inflicting behaviors. Default: 1.0.

StunScoreMult.description: Multiplier for stun score based on stun damage. Default: 100.0.

StunFromTile.description: Tile-based utility multiplier for Stun behavior. Accessed at 0x124. Default: 1.0.

MoveBaseScore.description: Base score for movement behaviors. Default: 1.0.

MoveScoreMult.description: Multiplier for movement score calculations. Default: 100.0.

NearTileLimit.description: Maximum number of nearby tiles to evaluate in detail. Limits computation. Default: 64.

TileScoreDifferenceMult.description: Multiplier for tile score differences when comparing options. Default: 1.0.

TileScoreDifferencePow.description: Exponent for tile score difference calculations. Default: 1.0.

UtilityThreshold.description: Minimum utility required to consider an action. Filters low-value behaviors. Default: 0.1.

PathfindingSafetyCostMult.description: Multiplier for safety costs during pathfinding. Affects route selection through danger. Default: 1.0.

PathfindingUnknownTileSafety.description: Safety value assigned to unexplored tiles during pathfinding. Default: 100.0.

PathfindingHiddenFromOpponentsBonus.description: Bonus score for paths hidden from enemies. Default: 20.

EntirePathScoreContribution.description: Weight of total path score vs destination score. Affects path vs endpoint priority. Default: 0.01.

MoveIfNewTileIsBetterBy.description: Minimum improvement required to justify movement to new tile. Default: 1.1.

GetUpIfNewTileIsBetterBy.description: Minimum improvement to justify standing from cover. Default: 1.15.

DistanceTooFarForOneTurnMult.description: Score penalty for destinations requiring multiple turns to reach. Default: 1.0.

ConsiderAlternativeIfBetterBy.description: Threshold to consider alternative actions over current best. Default: 1.1.

ConsiderAlternativeToUltimateIfBetterBy.description: Threshold to prefer non-ultimate abilities. Default: 1.5.

EnoughAPToPerformSkillAfterwards.description: AP threshold to ensure skill usability after movement. Default: 1.15.

EnoughAPToPerformOnlySkillAfterwards.description: Stricter AP threshold for critical skills after movement. Default: 1.1.

EnoughAPToDeployAfterwards.description: AP threshold for deployment ability after movement. Default: 1.05.

BuffBaseScore.description: Base score for buff/support behaviors. Default: 150.0.

BuffTargetValueMult.description: Multiplier for buff target value calculations. Used in Buff.GetTargetValue at 0x174. Default: 1.0.

BuffFromTile.description: Tile-based utility multiplier for buff behaviors. Default: 4.0.

RemoveSuppressionMult.description: Multiplier for suppression removal value. Used at offset 0x17c in Buff evaluation. Default: 1.0.

RemoveStunnedMult.description: Multiplier for stun removal value. Default: 1.0.

RestoreMoraleMult.description: Multiplier for morale restoration buff value. Accessed at 0x180 and 0x184. Default: 1.0.

IncreaseMovementMult.description: Multiplier for movement boost buff value. Default: 1.0.

IncreaseOffensiveStatsMult.description: Multiplier for offensive stat buff value. Accessed at 0x18c for cover bonus. Default: 1.0.

IncreaseDefensiveStatsMult.description: Multiplier for defensive stat buff value. Default: 1.0.

SupplyAmmoBaseScore.description: Base score for ammo supply behavior. Default: 150.0.

SupplyAmmoTargetValueMult.description: Multiplier for ammo supply target evaluation. Default: 1.0.

SupplyAmmoNoAmmoMult.description: Multiplier when target has no ammo. Prioritizes empty weapons. Default: 2.0.

SupplyAmmoSpecialWeaponMult.description: Multiplier for supplying special/heavy weapons. Default: 2.0.

SupplyAmmoGoalThreshold.description: Threat threshold for ammo supply urgency. Accessed at 0x1a4 in SupplyAmmo. Default: 0.1.

SupplyAmmoFromTile.description: Tile-based utility for ammo supply. Default: 4.0.

TargetDesignatorBaseScore.description: Base score for target designator/marking behavior. Default: 100.0.

TargetDesignatorScoreMult.description: Multiplier for target designator effectiveness. Default: 1.0.

TargetDesignatorFromTile.description: Tile-based utility for target designation. Accessed at 0x1b4. Default: 1.0.

GainBonusTurnBaseMult.description: Multiplier for bonus turn/extra action value. Accessed at 0x1b8 in GainBonusTurn. Default: 1.0.

m_GameDesignComment.description: Internal design comment for developers. Not visible in-game, used for documentation purposes during development.

m_LocaState.description: Localization state tracking whether text content has been translated and verified.

m_ID.description: Unique string identifier for this armor template. Used for lookups and references.

m_IsGarbage.description: Marks the template as deleted or invalid. Garbage templates are skipped during processing.

m_IsInitialized.description: Indicates whether the template has been fully initialized and is ready for use.

Title.description: Localized display name of the armor shown in UI tooltips and inventory.

ShortName.description: Abbreviated localized name for compact UI displays where full title doesn't fit.

Description.description: Localized multi-line description text shown in armor tooltips and detail views.

Icon.description: Main icon sprite displayed in inventory grids and general UI contexts.

Tags.description: Tags for categorizing armor. Used for filtering, AI behavior, and equipment restrictions.

Rarity.description: Rarity tier of the armor. Affects drop rates, trade value, and UI color coding.

MinCampaignProgress.description: Minimum campaign progress required before this armor can appear in the game.

TradeValue.description: Base value in currency when selling or trading this armor piece.

BlackMarketMaxQuantity.description: Maximum number of this armor that can appear simultaneously in black market shops.

m_LocalizedStrings.description: Array of all localizable string references used by this template.

IconEquipment.description: Icon displayed in equipment slots when armor is equipped on a soldier.

IconEquipmentDisabled.description: Grayed-out equipment icon shown when armor cannot be equipped or is unavailable.

IconSkillBar.description: Icon for skills granted by this armor, shown in tactical skill bar.

IconSkillBarDisabled.description: Disabled version of skill bar icon when armor-granted skill is unavailable.

IconSkillBarAlternative.description: Alternative skill bar icon for secondary states or alternate skill modes.

IconSkillBarAlternativeDisabled.description: Disabled version of the alternative skill bar icon.

SlotType.description: Which equipment slot this armor occupies (torso, legs, head, etc.).

ItemType.description: General item category classification for this armor piece.

OnlyEquipableBy.description: Tag restrictions for who can equip this armor. Only units with matching tags can use it.

ExclusiveCategory.description: Mutually exclusive category preventing multiple items of same category being equipped.

DeployCosts.description: Resource costs required to deploy a unit wearing this armor into missions.

SkillsGranted.description: List of skills the wearer gains while this armor is equipped.

Model.description: Primary 3D model prefab for this armor's visual representation on units.

VisualAlterationSlot.description: Which visual slot on the character model this armor modifies or replaces.

ModelSecondary.description: Secondary 3D model for armor pieces that affect multiple body parts.

VisualAlterationSlotSecondary.description: Visual slot for the secondary model component of this armor.

AttachLightAtNight.description: If true, attaches a light source to the armor model during night missions.

HasSpecialFemaleModels.description: Whether this armor has separate models for female character body types.

MaleModels.description: Array of 3D model variants for male characters. Initialized in ctor at 0x130.

FemaleModels.description: Array of 3D model variants for female characters. Initialized in ctor at 0x138.

SquadLeaderMode.description: How squad leader appearance is handled - use fixed model, skin variants, or default.

SquadLeaderModelMaleWhite.description: Squad leader model for male white skin tone. Used when SquadLeaderMode uses variants.

SquadLeaderModelMaleBrown.description: Squad leader model for male brown skin tone variant.

SquadLeaderModelMaleBlack.description: Squad leader model for male black skin tone variant.

SquadLeaderModelFemaleWhite.description: Squad leader model for female white skin tone variant.

SquadLeaderModelFemaleBrown.description: Squad leader model for female brown skin tone variant.

SquadLeaderModelFemaleBlack.description: Squad leader model for female black skin tone variant.

SquadLeaderModelFixed.description: Fixed squad leader model used when SquadLeaderMode ignores gender/skin variations.

OverrideScale.description: If true, applies custom scaling from Scale field to the unit wearing this armor.

Scale.description: Custom X/Y scale multipliers applied to unit model. Defaults to (1.0, 1.0) in ctor.

AnimSize.description: Animation size category affecting which animation set is used (light, medium, heavy).

Armor.description: Base armor value added to all body parts. Reduces incoming damage up to this value.

DurabilityPerElement.description: Armor durability points per body element. Applied via ApplyToEntityProperties at 0x2c.

DamageResistance.description: Percentage of damage reduction after armor. Subtracted from 1.0 and clamped to 0+.

HitpointsPerElement.description: Additional hitpoints granted to each body part element when armor is equipped.

HitpointsPerElementMult.description: Multiplier to hitpoints per element. Stacks multiplicatively. Default 1.0 in ctor.

Accuracy.description: Flat bonus to unit's accuracy stat while wearing this armor. Shown in tooltips.

AccuracyMult.description: Percentage multiplier to accuracy. Stacks multiplicatively. Default 1.0 in ctor.

DefenseMult.description: Multiplier to defense stat affecting dodge chance. Stacks multiplicatively. Default 1.0.

Discipline.description: Flat bonus to unit's discipline stat. Affects morale, willpower, and panic resistance.

DisciplineMult.description: Multiplier to discipline stat. Stacks multiplicatively. Default 1.0 in ctor.

Vision.description: Flat bonus to vision range in tiles. Affects how far the unit can see enemies.

VisionMult.description: Multiplier to vision range. Stacks multiplicatively. Default 1.0 in ctor.

Detection.description: Flat bonus to detection stat. Affects ability to detect hidden or concealed enemies.

DetectionMult.description: Multiplier to detection stat. Stacks multiplicatively. Default 1.0 in ctor.

Concealment.description: Flat bonus to concealment stat. Makes the wearer harder to detect by enemies.

ConcealmentMult.description: Multiplier to concealment stat. Stacks multiplicatively. Default 1.0 in ctor.

SuppressionImpactMult.description: Multiplier to suppression effects received. Lower values reduce panic from suppression.

GetDismemberedChanceBonus.description: Flat modifier to chance of getting dismembered. Positive increases chance, negative decreases.

GetDismemberedChanceMult.description: Multiplier to dismemberment chance. Lower values provide protection. Default 1.0 in ctor.

ActionPoints.description: Flat bonus to action points per turn. Can be negative for heavy armor penalties.

ActionPointsMult.description: Multiplier to action points. Stacks multiplicatively. Default 1.0 in ctor.

AdditionalMovementCost.description: Extra movement cost per tile. Heavy armor increases cost, making movement slower.

ItemSlots.description: Array of item slot types this armor provides. Added on equip, removed on unequip. Size 11 in ctor.

SoundOnMovementStep.description: Sound bank ID for footstep sounds when unit moves while wearing this armor.

SoundOnMovementStepOverrides2.description: Surface-specific footstep sound overrides for different terrain materials.

SoundOnMovementSymbolic.description: Sound bank ID for symbolic/ambient movement sounds like gear rattling.

SoundOnArmorHit.description: Sound bank ID played when damage hits the armor layer of protection.

SoundOnHitpointsHit.description: Sound bank ID for male unit pain vocalization when taking hitpoint damage.

SoundOnHitpointsHitFemale.description: Sound bank ID for female unit pain vocalization when taking hitpoint damage.

SoundOnDeath.description: Sound bank ID for male unit death vocalization when killed.

SoundOnDeathFemale.description: Sound bank ID for female unit death vocalization when killed.

m_GameDesignComment.description: Designer notes for internal documentation. Not used by game logic, purely for development reference.

m_LocaState.description: Localization state enum tracking translation status. Used by localization pipeline to track which strings need translation.

m_ID.description: Unique string identifier for this template. Used for serialization and asset references throughout the game.

m_IsGarbage.description: Marks template as deprecated/deleted. When true, template should not appear in game or editor listings.

m_IsInitialized.description: Internal flag indicating if template has been initialized. Set during Init() call, prevents double initialization.

Title.description: Localized display name shown in UI. Referenced via localization key for multi-language support.

ShortName.description: Abbreviated localized name for compact UI elements. Falls back to Title if empty per GetShortName() logic.

Description.description: Localized multi-line description displayed in tooltips and detail views.

Icon.description: Primary icon sprite used in inventory and general UI representations.

Tags.description: Tag references for categorization, filtering, and gameplay logic. Used by HasTag() checks and equipment restrictions.

Rarity.description: Item rarity tier affecting loot tables and UI presentation. Higher values typically indicate rarer items.

MinCampaignProgress.description: Minimum campaign progress required before this weapon can appear. Controls when items become available during progression.

TradeValue.description: Base trade/sell value in currency. Used by trading systems and black market pricing calculations.

BlackMarketMaxQuantity.description: Maximum quantity that can appear in black market inventory at once. Limits availability of powerful weapons.

m_LocalizedStrings.description: Array of all localizable strings in this template. Used by GetLocalizedStrings() for localization export.

IconEquipment.description: Icon displayed in equipment/loadout screens. Typically larger or differently styled than base Icon.

IconEquipmentDisabled.description: Grayed-out equipment icon shown when weapon is unavailable or cannot be equipped.

IconSkillBar.description: Icon used in tactical skill bar when weapon skill is available.

IconSkillBarDisabled.description: Skill bar icon shown when weapon skill cannot be used (out of ammo, on cooldown, etc.).

IconSkillBarAlternative.description: Alternative skill bar icon for secondary fire modes or special states.

IconSkillBarAlternativeDisabled.description: Disabled version of alternative skill bar icon.

SlotType.description: Equipment slot this weapon occupies. Values 8/9/10 are modular vehicle weapon slots. Checked by IsModularVehicleWeaponSlot() and CanFitInSlot().

ItemType.description: General item category enum. Used for filtering and categorization in inventory systems.

OnlyEquipableBy.description: Tag restrictions for equipping. Unit must have at least one matching tag to equip this weapon. Initialized in constructor.

ExclusiveCategory.description: Mutual exclusion category. Only one item per category can be equipped. Prevents stacking similar weapon types.

DeployCosts.description: Resource cost to deploy this weapon in missions. Struct containing various resource types. Scaled by operation properties.

SkillsGranted.description: Skills provided when weapon is equipped. Initialized in constructor. First skill's handlers used for stat calculations.

Model.description: Primary 3D model prefab attached to vehicle when weapon is mounted. Used by AttachPrefab() during mounting.

VisualAlterationSlot.description: Attachment point enum for primary model. Maps to named bone/transform on vehicle via GetAttachmentPointName().

ModelSecondary.description: Secondary 3D model prefab for twin-fire configurations or auxiliary weapon parts.

VisualAlterationSlotSecondary.description: Attachment point enum for secondary model. Used when weapon has dual mounting points.

AttachLightAtNight.description: Whether to attach light component during night missions. Enables weapon-mounted illumination for visibility.

AnimType.description: Animation type enum determining which firing/reload animations to use on the vehicle.

AnimSize.description: Weapon size category for animation selection. Affects how vehicle handles weapon during animations.

AnimGrip.description: Grip style enum affecting weapon handling animations. Determines turret rotation behavior.

AnimationSoundTemplate.description: Sound template reference for weapon audio. Contains firing, reload, and other weapon sounds indexed by animation events.

MinRange.description: Minimum effective range in tiles. Initialized to 1 in constructor. Targets closer than this suffer accuracy penalties.

IdealRange.description: Optimal combat range in tiles. Initialized to 1 in constructor. Accuracy is best at this range with no dropoff.

MaxRange.description: Maximum effective range in tiles. Initialized to 1 in constructor. Cannot target beyond this distance.

AccuracyBonus.description: Base accuracy modifier added to entity properties. Applied in ApplyToEntityProperties() at offset 0x68.

AccuracyDropoff.description: Accuracy penalty per tile beyond ideal range. Applied in ApplyToEntityProperties() at offset 0x70.

Damage.description: Base damage per hit. Applied in ApplyToEntityProperties() at offset 0x118. Used in tooltip damage calculations.

DamageDropoff.description: Damage reduction per tile beyond ideal range. Applied in ApplyToEntityProperties() at offset 0x120.

DamagePctCurrentHitpoints.description: Percentage of target's current HP dealt as bonus damage. Applied at offset 0x144. For anti-vehicle weapons.

DamagePctCurrentHitpointsMin.description: Minimum damage when using current HP percentage. Applied at offset 0x148. Floor value for percentage damage.

DamagePctMaxHitpoints.description: Percentage of target's max HP dealt as bonus damage. Applied at offset 0x14C. For consistent anti-armor damage.

DamagePctMaxHitpointsMin.description: Minimum damage when using max HP percentage. Applied at offset 0x150. Floor value for percentage damage.

ArmorPenetration.description: Armor bypass value. Applied in ApplyToEntityProperties() at offset 0x100. Higher values ignore more armor.

ArmorPenetrationDropoff.description: Armor penetration reduction per tile beyond ideal range. Applied at offset 0x108.

DamageToArmorDurability.description: Base damage dealt to target's armor durability. Initialized to 1.0f (0x3f800000). Applied at offset 0x12C.

DamageToArmorDurabilityMult.description: Multiplier for armor durability damage. Initialized to 1.0f. Uses AddMult_StackPercentages at offset 0x130.

DamageToArmorDurabilityDropoff.description: Armor durability damage reduction per tile beyond ideal range. Applied at offset 0x134.

DamageToArmorDurabilityDropoffMult.description: Multiplier for armor durability damage dropoff. Initialized to 1.0f. Uses AddMult_StackPercentages at offset 0x138.

Suppression.description: Suppression value applied to targets. Applied in ApplyToEntityProperties() at offset 0xE0. Affects target morale.

SupportsIntegrationOfLightWeapons.description: Whether this heavy weapon allows light weapons in adjacent slots. Checked during slot compatibility verification.

DisableOtherWeaponSlots.description: When true, equipping this weapon removes all other weapons. Checked in Place() - triggers RemoveAllWeapons() and IsLightSlotDeactivated().

Setups.description: Array of vehicle-specific mounting configurations. GetSetup() iterates at offset 0x190 matching ModularVehicleType. Each setup defines attachment points.

m_GameDesignComment.description: Designer notes field for internal documentation. Not used at runtime, purely for editor reference.

Sender.description: Name or identifier of the entity/faction sending this event message

Message.description: Main body text content of the event notification

Title.description: Header title displayed at the top of the event notification

TitleColor.description: RGBA color used to render the event title text

MessageIcon.description: Icon sprite displayed alongside the event when it appears in the message list

MessageOpenedIcon.description: Icon sprite displayed after the event message has been read/opened

Flags.description: Bitflags controlling event behavior (Intro, Mandatory, etc.). Default: 1 (Intro)

ReqOpsPlayed.description: Required number of operations/missions played before this event can trigger

Visible.description: Whether the unit is visible on the tactical map at this intel level

ExactPosition.description: Whether the unit's exact grid position is known (vs approximate location)

Tooltip.description: Whether tooltip information is shown when hovering over the unit

UnitFaction.description: Whether the unit's faction allegiance is revealed at this intel level

UnitType.description: Whether the unit's type/class is identified at this intel level

UnitName.description: Whether the unit's specific name is revealed at this intel level

UnitDescription.description: Whether the unit's detailed description text is available at this intel level

UnitStats.description: Whether detailed unit statistics (HP, armor, abilities) are shown at this intel level

Index.description: Unique index identifying this ragdoll part within the ragdoll system

BoneName.description: Name of the skeleton bone this ragdoll part is attached to

Area.description: Hit area category this part belongs to (head, torso, limb, etc.). Default: 1

NormalHitSelectWeight.description: Weighted probability for this part being selected when calculating normal hit location

BaseHitForce.description: Base force applied to this ragdoll part when hit, affecting physics response

DismemberSelectWeight.description: Weighted probability for this part being selected for dismemberment effects

MovementPreventsSleep.description: If true, movement of this part prevents the ragdoll physics from going to sleep. Default: true

ImpactEffect.description: Visual effect prefab spawned when a projectile/skill impacts this surface type

Decals.description: Collection of decal textures that can be applied to this surface on impact

DecalChance.description: Percentage chance (0-100) of spawning a decal on impact

RicochetChance.description: Percentage chance (0-100) of projectiles ricocheting off this surface

SoundOnRicochet.description: Sound effect ID played when a projectile ricochets off this surface

SoundOnImpact.description: Sound effect ID played when a projectile impacts this surface

RoleName.description: Display name identifying this conversation role (e.g., 'Player', 'Commander')

Optional.description: If true, this role doesn't require a speaker to be assigned for the conversation to proceed

Guid.description: Unique identifier for this role within the conversation system. Default: generated

Position.description: Screen position where this role's speaker portrait/UI appears (Left, Right, Center)

EntityIdx.description: Index into the entity array for runtime speaker assignment. Default: -1 (unassigned)

m_SerializedRequirements.description: Internal serialized list of role requirements as JSON strings

Comment.description: Editor comment describing the purpose of this conditional intro (not displayed in-game)

Condition.description: Condition that must be met for this intro text to be selected

Text.description: Localized multi-line text displayed as the operation introduction

Priority.description: Selection priority when multiple conditional intros match; higher values selected first

Repeatable.description: If true, this intro can be shown multiple times; if false, shown only once per campaign. Default: true

Trigger.description: Type of event that triggers this emotional reaction (kill, wound, ally death, etc.)

PossibleReactions.description: Emotional state(s) that can result from this trigger (anger, fear, panic, etc.)

ShowExtraRequirements.description: If true, displays additional targeting requirements in the editor UI

TargetTags.description: Tag filters specifying which targets can trigger this emotional reaction

RequiredEnemyFaction.description: Optional faction requirement; trigger only activates against this enemy faction

Templates.description: List of entity templates that can be spawned as this actor type

Faction.description: Faction this actor belongs to (Player, Enemy, Neutral, etc.). Default: 3 (Neutral)

Count.description: Min/max count range (x=min, y=max) of actors to spawn. Default: (1, 3)

SpawnAreas.description: Array of area configurations defining where these actors can spawn

SpawnAreaSettings.description: Settings controlling spawn area selection and placement. Default: 1

HomePlanet.description: Home planet/region affecting the squaddie's nationality and appearance options

RandomGender.description: If true, gender is randomly selected; if false, uses the Gender field. Default: true

Gender.description: Specific gender when RandomGender is false (Male, Female, etc.)

RandomSkinColor.description: If true, skin color is randomly selected; if false, uses SkinColor field. Default: true

SkinColor.description: Specific skin color when RandomSkinColor is false

Text.description: Localized text content of the subtitle to display

Time.description: Start and end time (x=start, y=end) in seconds for when to display this subtitle

Color.description: RGBA color used to render the subtitle text

HideInEnglish.description: If true, this subtitle is hidden when the game language is English

LocaIdx.description: Index into the localization table for this subtitle. Default: -1 (use Text field)

Item.description: Reference to the item template that can drop as loot

Count.description: Number of items to drop when this loot entry triggers

OverrideDefaultDropChance.description: If true, uses DropChance field; if false, uses global default drop chance from config

DropChance.description: Percentage chance (0-100) of this item dropping when OverrideDefaultDropChance is true

SlotType.description: Type of slot (weapon, utility, armor, etc.) determining what can be equipped

TransformName.description: Name of the transform/bone in the vehicle model where this slot's equipment attaches

AllowsLightWeaponToBeIntegrated.description: If true, light weapons can be integrated into this slot rather than mounted separately

SecondTransformName.description: Optional secondary transform for dual-mounted or articulated equipment

Vehicle.description: Type of modular vehicle this weapon setup is designed for

StandaloneModel.description: Full weapon model prefab used when weapon is displayed independently

BarrelOnlyModel.description: Simplified barrel-only model for integrated weapon mounts

OverrideChassisModel.description: Optional replacement chassis model when this weapon is equipped

Template.description: Reference to the entity template for this army unit type

Weight.description: Selection weight for random picking of this unit type from the army roster. Default: 10

WeightMultAfterPick.description: Multiplier applied to weight after this unit is picked, affecting future selection probability. Default: 1.0

RollsPerUnit.description: Number of intelligence roll attempts per unit in range

RollSuccessChance.description: Percentage chance (0-100) of each roll succeeding. Default: 50

MinRollToExplode.description: Minimum successful roll result to trigger 'exploding' intel bonus. Default: 83 (0x53)

EmotionalState.description: The emotional state that triggers this response (anger, fear, panic, etc.)

Text.description: Localized dialogue text spoken when this emotional response activates

Sound.description: Sound effect or voice line ID played with this emotional response

Type.description: Data type of the animator parameter (Bool, Int, Float, Trigger). Default: 2 (Float)

Name.description: Name of the animator parameter to set in the Animator Controller

Value.description: Initial value to set for this parameter (parsed according to Type)

IsLight.description: If true, this attachment is treated as a light source affecting lighting calculations

AttachmentPointName.description: Name of the bone/transform where this prefab attaches on the parent object

Prefab.description: The prefab GameObject to instantiate and attach

Offset.description: Grid cell offset from the mission origin where this setpiece should be placed

Variance.description: Random variance range in grid cells (x,y) applied to the offset for placement variation

Setpiece.description: Reference to the setpiece definition to place at this location

Template.description: Reference to the mission template this config represents

Weight.description: Selection weight used when randomly picking from multiple mission configs
Selection weight for picking this template list. Default: 10

Templates.description: List of map generation configurations available for mission map creation

Prefab.description: The prefab GameObject to spawn at this fixed location

Rotation.description: Rotation setting for the prefab (None, 90, 180, 270 degrees)

Skill.description: Reference to the perk template defining the actual perk abilities and effects

Tier.description: Tier/level of this perk in the perk tree hierarchy

Weight.description: Selection weight for picking this setpiece list. Default: 10

Templates.description: List of setpiece placements included in this configuration

Comparator.description: Comparison operation for tag matching (HasAll, HasAny, HasNone, etc.)

Tags.description: Comma-separated or formatted string of tags to match against

ArmyTemplate.description: Reference to the army template defining unit composition

Weight.description: Selection weight when randomly picking an army configuration. Default: 10

Weather.description: Reference to the weather template defining weather conditions

Weight.description: Selection weight when randomly picking weather conditions

Objectives.description: Array of objective configurations that make up this objective group

Text.description: Localized multi-line text displayed as the operation introduction

Skills.description: List of skill templates that belong to this skill group

Defects.description: List of defect templates that belong to this defect group

m_GraphData.description: Internal graph data structure containing nodes, connections, and graph metadata
